## **Pricing and paywall** {#theme-pricing_paywall}

   **Pricing and paywall.**
      1 recent review(s) mention pricing and paywall.
      Review window: Mar 14, 2026 - Mar 14, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention price, subscriptions, or paywalls. This can signal pricing sensitivity in the niche.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Kathrine Hansen_, Mar 14, 2026, 1/5: "I can't even log in, let alone cancel my subscription. I made an account through a facebook link and downloaded the app, but i can't log in as it says my password is wrong, i might be forgetful, but i literally just made the password. Not even I forget that fast. When i press the create a new password button in the mail I'm just booted back to the log in page. Consider this me unsubscribing within the 14 day period, I'm pretty sure in a calisthenics kind of girl anyway."
